wifi.countryHint: Regulatory region, applies at the next restart.

power.title: Power
power.sleepHint: Display off - turn the TV on to wake
power.shutdownHint: Needs power cycling to turn back on
power.sleepTimerHint: Turns the TV off after the set time (the box stays on).

ambient.title: Ambient screen
ambient.photosHint: Scan the QR with your phone and pick photos - they upload resized.
ambient.sleepHint: On the screensaver, over HDMI-CEC. The box stays on.
ambient.bingHint: Mix Bing's daily wallpapers into the slideshow

bt.title: Bluetooth
bt.none: No devices - scan to find some
bt.lowBatteryMsg: {name}: {pct}%. Charge it or replace the batteries soon.

remote.title: Remote buttons
remote.hint: Standard remotes (arrows / OK / Back / Home) work as-is. To teach a remote another button, pick an action under it and press that button on the remote. Each remote is remapped on its own.
remote.none: No remotes connected - pair or wake one first.
remote.powerWarn: The box has to be turned back on by hand after this.

power.tv_and_box: Turn off the TV and this box

remote.testHint: Press buttons on this remote - each one shows up here with the key it sends. Exits by itself after 12 seconds without a press.

appsettings.title: Apps
appsettings.hint: Reorder or hide apps on the home screen.

audio.title: Audio
audio.trackLangHint: Streams pick this audio track when available (mpv).
audio.subLangHint: Subtitles turn on when a matching track exists (mpv).

about.title: Diagnostics
about.creditsIntro: tvbox is MIT-licensed and built on these projects:
about.trademarks: Not affiliated with or endorsed by Amazon. Fire TV and Alexa are trademarks of Amazon; used only to describe compatibility. The Fire TV remote feature interoperates with hardware you own and is experimental - use at your own risk.

app.shellUnreachableHint: The tvbox service didn't answer. It may still be starting - try again in a moment.

store.title: App Store
store.hint: Community apps from the tvbox store. Installing adds the app to your home screen.
store.empty: No apps in the store yet
store.installed: {name} installed - it's on your home screen

update.title: Software update
update.installHint: The box restarts at the end (a minute or two).
update.failedRollback: Update {version} didn't start up and was rolled back automatically. Try again, or wait for the next release.
update.autoHint: Installs overnight, only while nothing is playing.
update.osAuto: Security updates install themselves in the background - no action needed.
update.rebootNeeded: A restart is recommended to finish system updates.
update.appsAutoHint: Installs app updates from the store overnight, only while the box is idle.

hostname.title: Device name
hostname.hint: Name this box so several boxes are easy to tell apart on your network.
hostname.name: Name
hostname.later: Saved - the new name applies after the next box update.

region.title: Setup
region.welcome: Welcome - let's get your box ready.
region.keymapLater: Saved - the keyboard layout applies after the next box update.
region.tzLater: Saved - the time zone applies after the next box update.

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.hint: Save the box's settings (channels, accounts, app layout) to your phone as a password-encrypted file - and restore them from there, even onto a re-flashed box.
backup.phoneHint: Scan the QR with your phone. On the page you can download an encrypted backup, or pick a saved file to restore.

parental.title: Parental controls
parental.hint: One PIN for the whole box: apps use it to lock content (e.g. Live TV categories).
parental.requireHint: Installing and uninstalling apps asks for the PIN.

mqtt.title: MQTT / Home Assistant
mqtt.hint: Bridge this box to Home Assistant or any MQTT broker: a now-playing sensor, remote commands and on-screen notifications. Changes apply immediately.
mqtt.offHint: Leave the broker host empty to turn the integration off.

ir.title: IR blaster (TV volume)
ir.hint: Send volume and mute to the TV through a network IR blaster when the TV takes no CEC volume. The remotes' volume buttons and MQTT/voice commands all use it.
ir.offHint: Leave the device host / URL empty to turn the integration off.
ir.actionsHintEsphome: The learned signal slot to replay per command - the options of the device's signal select.
ir.actionsHintHa: The Home Assistant script to run per command (a script.* entity id).

firetvir.title: Fire TV remote → TV IR
firetvir.hint: Teach a paired Fire TV / Alexa remote to control the TV's volume, mute and power over its own infrared - no Fire TV box needed. Great if the remote's power/volume stopped working after a reset.
firetvir.depsNeeded: This needs a one-time Bluetooth support download (internet required).
firetvir.noRemote: No Bluetooth remote paired. Pair one in Bluetooth above first.
firetvir.narrow: Keep typing to narrow the list…
firetvir.testHint: Point the remote at the TV and try each button - it should react. Nothing is saved to the remote yet.
firetvir.someUnsupported: Some buttons use an IR format this box can't generate yet - they're greyed out. Try another codeset for your brand.
firetvir.programmed: Done - the remote now controls the TV directly. Its volume keys were handed back to it.
firetvir.credit: TV codes from the community irdb database (github.com/probonopd/irdb). See About for credits.
firetvir.suggested: Detected your TV as {brand} - suggested below.
